title: Fit test - 1st screen close button [TBD]
scenario: Fit Test first screen close button returns user to Device Settings instead of staying in Fit Test flow
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app with a device that supports Fit Test connected.
2. Navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Device Settings.
4. On the first Fit Test screen, tap the close button (X).
expected: The Fit Test screen is closed and the user is returned to the Device Settings screen.
